opinion.h4: HOBART v. HOBART. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF OHIO. No. 355. Decided October 21, 1957.
opinion.p: Baird Broomhall, William M. Harrelson and Richard Wilson for appellant.
C. V. Diedel and Frank E. Bazler for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
